title: Countdown Calculator - Days Until Date
description: Free countdown calculator. Find out how many days, hours, minutes, and seconds until a specific date.
keywords: countdown calculator, days until, countdown timer, date countdown
intro: Calculate the time remaining until a specific date and time.

faq.a: The calculator computes the difference between now and your target date, displaying the result in days, hours, minutes, and seconds.

faq.q: Does it update in real time?
faq.a: Yes, once calculated the countdown updates every second automatically.
